name: Hummus Bi Tahini
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chickpeas with their juice and baking soda in a large pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat, drain thoroughly, and rinse well.
3. In a food processor, combine the chickpeas, tahini, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and 2 tablespoons cold water. Blend until creamy.
4. Add the remaining cold water if the mixture appears too thick. Refrigerate.
5. Heat olive oil in a pan and fry pine nuts until golden brown.
6. When ready to serve, sprinkle the pine nuts over the hummus. Serve cold with pita bread.
